---
title: "Sister Cities: Connections analysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
# Load packages
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(tidygraph)
  library(ggraph)
  library(knitr)
})
```

## Prepare data

```{r}
# Run helper script (writes output/graph.rds)
source('../analysis/sister_cities_analysis.R')

graph <- readRDS('../output/graph.rds')
nodes <- as_tibble(graph, what = 'nodes')
edges <- as_tibble(graph, what = 'edges')
```

## Top cities by number of sister links

```{r}
nodes %>% arrange(desc(degree)) %>% slice_head(n = 20) %>% kable()
```

## Network plot

```{r}
set.seed(42)
ggraph(graph, layout = 'fr') +
  geom_edge_link(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_node_point(aes(size = degree), color = 'steelblue') +
  geom_node_text(aes(label = name), repel = TRUE, size = 3) +
  theme_void()
```
